highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 adds WASM support for .NET 11 and fixes a native resource leak in SKImage.
highlights_body: This release ships Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for WASM .NET 11 targets and merges the latest upstream Skia m151 bug fixes. It also corrects a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData when a crop rectangle is supplied.

bullets.lead: Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged
bullets.detail: The latest bug fixes from the chrome/m151 branch have been pulled into the bundled Skia engine, improving rendering correctness across all platforms.
Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are now included for WASM targets, enabling SkiaSharp to build and run under .NET 11 on WebAssembly.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData with crop
bullets.detail: Calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) previously leaked a native image handle when the crop rectangle was supplied. The extra reference is now released correctly.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Added Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries to enable SkiaSharp on WASM .NET 11
